requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and MBS Import Conformity for EV Charging Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线与MBS电动汽车充电设备进口合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線與MBS電動汽車充電設備進口合格評定

summary.en: Malawi's national standards body, the Malawi Bureau of Standards (MBS), adopts and adapts IEC and ISO standards as the basis for Malawi Standards (MS). General electrical equipment imported into Malawi is subject to MBS import inspection and conformity assessment requirements. A dedicated mandatory MBS technical regulation specifically for EV charging equipment (EVSE) could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; however, EV chargers as electrical equipment fall within the general scope of MBS electrical product import controls and should be expected to require MBS conformity documentation aligned with IEC standards. IEC 61851-1:2017 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions. IEC 61851-23:2023 addresses DC EV charging stations. Applicable IP protection ratings for Malawi's tropical climate conditions include IP54 minimum for outdoor installations, with higher ingress protection advisable given seasonal heavy rainfall (Malawi's rainy season produces intense precipitation). Thermal design for tropical ambient temperatures (Malawi's central and southern lowlands regularly reach 35–40 °C in hot season) is also required.
summary.zh: 马拉维国家标准机构马拉维标准局（MBS）以IEC和ISO标准为基础制定和调整马拉维标准（MS）。进口至马拉维的一般电气设备须符合MBS进口检验和合格评定要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认专门针对电动汽车充电设备（EVSE）的MBS强制技术法规；然而，电动汽车充电桩作为电气设备属于MBS电气产品进口管控的一般范围，预计须提供符合IEC标准的MBS合格评定文件。IEC 61851-1:2017是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车充电站。马拉维热带气候条件下适用的IP防护等级：室外安装最低IP54，考虑到季节性强降雨（马拉维雨季降水强度大），建议更高防护等级。热带环境温度的热设计（马拉维中南部低地热季常达35至40°C）亦属必要。
summary.zht: 馬拉威國家標準機構馬拉威標準局（MBS）以IEC和ISO標準為基礎制定和調整馬拉威標準（MS）。進口至馬拉威的一般電氣設備須符合MBS進口檢驗和合格評定要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認專門針對電動汽車充電設備（EVSE）的MBS強制技術法規；然而，電動汽車充電樁作為電氣設備屬於MBS電氣產品進口管控的一般範圍，預計須提供符合IEC標準的MBS合格評定文件。IEC 61851-1:2017是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車充電站。馬拉威熱帶氣候條件下適用的IP防護等級：室外安裝最低IP54，考慮到季節性強降雨（馬拉威雨季降水強度大），建議更高防護等級。熱帶環境溫度的熱設計（馬拉威中南部低地熱季常達35至40°C）亦屬必要。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum for outdoor tropical installations
MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — import conformity assessment for electrical equipment
MERA (Malawi Energy Regulatory Authority) — energy equipment approval requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence may be useful as a design starting-point reference and for engineering review, but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports that would be required for MBS import conformity assessment or MERA approval in Malawi. China CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers certain EV charging products but carries no recognition in Malawi's MBS framework.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考和工程审查的依据，但不能替代MBS进口合格评定或MERA审批所需的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。中国强制认证（CCC）涵盖部分电动汽车充电产品，但在马拉维MBS框架内不具认可效力。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考和工程審查的依據，但不能替代MBS進口合格評定或MERA審批所需的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。中國強制認證（CCC）涵蓋部分電動汽車充電產品，但在馬拉威MBS框架內不具認可效力。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause compliance matrix and accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC charging stations; (3) IP-rated enclosure certificates at IP54 minimum for outdoor installations in tropical/rainy conditions, with IP65 advisable; (4) protective device ratings and wiring documentation suitable for local installation by MBS-registered or qualified electricians; (5) thermal design and derating evidence for tropical ambient temperatures (35–40 °C in hot season); (6) verification of current MBS compulsory conformity requirements and applicable MBS/MS standards for EVSE with MBS or a qualified agent before shipment. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条合规矩阵及ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；(2) 直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) 室外热带/雨季安装IP54最低防护等级认证书，建议IP65；(4) 适合MBS注册或合格电工就地安装的保护器件额定值和接线文件；(5) 热带环境温度（热季35至40°C）下的热设计和降额证据；(6) 出货前向MBS或合格代理人核实现行MBS强制合格评定要求及适用于EVSE的MBS/MS标准。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條合規矩陣及ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；(2) 直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) 室外熱帶/雨季安裝IP54最低防護等級認證書，建議IP65；(4) 適合MBS注冊或合格電工就地安裝的保護器件額定值和接線文件；(5) 熱帶環境溫度（熱季35至40°C）下的熱設計和降額證據；(6) 出貨前向MBS或合格代理人核實現行MBS強制合格評定要求及適用於EVSE的MBS/MS標準。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory baseline — MBS import conformity assessment for electrical equipment applies; IEC 61851 is the expected safety framework; a specific mandatory EV charger MBS standard could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14 and must be verified with MBS before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Malawi without additional accredited testing; China CCC carries no MBS recognition

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Malawi-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates suitable for tropical and rainy-season conditions, and a thermal review. Verify the specific MBS compulsory conformity route for EVSE with MBS before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向马拉维的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适合热带和雨季条件的IP防护等级认证书，以及热环境审查。出货前应向MBS核实EVSE的具体MBS强制合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向馬拉威的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適合熱帶和雨季條件的IP防護等級認證書，以及熱環境審查。出貨前應向MBS核實EVSE的具體MBS強制合格評定路徑。
